query_normalized: llmxive follow-up: extending "from chatbot to digital colleague: the paradigm shift toward persisten" computer science
rationale: The paper investigates a specific internal limitation of LLMs (character-level understanding) which is a distinct construct from the user's question about the "paradigm shift toward persistent digital colleagues" (a socio-technical or architectural concept regarding agent persistence and role evolution). It does not measure the same mechanism, variables, or empirical population required for a literature review on the shift to persistent digital colleagues, nor does it serve as a foundational ref
